title: Switchy Pronouns
body:
Quick and dirty [Player Pronouns](https://modrinth.com/mod/player-pronouns) component for [Switchy 3](https://modrinth.com/mod/switchy).

Can't be implemented using just a datapack as Player Pronouns does not store its data in player NBT.

**Consider using [lampblack pronouns](https://modrinth.com/mod/lampblack) instead, which is natively supported by Switchy and is available for more versions!**

![Screenshot of '/switchy view default' output, showing 'pronouns: she/her' alongside the usual suspects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec240b0188030f523c639f571dab4ea92afb9758.png)
